name: Onetime Secret API
description: Onetime Secret is a service for sharing sensitive information securely. Secrets are encrypted and can only be viewed once before they are destroyed. The API supports creating secrets, retrieving secret metadata, generating random values, and checking system status. API v1 is the stable version.
